name: Experiment Tool
description: Test and experiment with different AI models using custom or predefined prompts

form.title: AI Model Experimentation
form.description: Review the AI model's response to your custom prompt. This output shows how the selected model processes your input and generates a response.

fields.name: prompts
fields.label: Available Prompts
fields.help: Select a predefined prompt type or choose "Current prompt" to use the last submitted prompt.

fields.name: prompt
fields.label: Prompt Text
fields.help: Enter the prompt text you want to test with the AI model. You can select from predefined prompts or enter your own. Maximum 10,000 characters.
fields.placeholder: Example: Explain quantum computing in simple terms
